Description: The AO3400A is an N-channel MOSFET utilizing advanced trench technology, designed for low on-resistance in a compact package. It functions as a voltage-controlled switch, suitable for applications like load switching and PWM control, by modulating the conductivity between its drain and source terminals via the gate voltage.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Control terminal. Voltage applied here creates an electric field to turn the channel between Drain and Source on/off.
Output/load terminal. Current flows out from this pin when the MOSFET is on and the load is connected to V+.
Input/reference terminal. Typically connected to ground or the lower voltage side of the load.
